Package org.areslib.math.geometry

Class Rotation2d

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.math.geometry.Rotation2d
All Implemented Interfaces:
Interpolatable<Rotation2d>
public class Rotation2d extends Object implements Interpolatable<Rotation2d>
A rotation in a 2D coordinate frame represented a point on the unit circle (cosine and sine).

  • Method Details

    • set

      public void set(double valueRadians)
      Sets the rotation in radians in-place. Useful for eliminating garbage collection overhead in tight loops.

    • setDegrees

      public void setDegrees(double degrees)
      Sets the rotation in degrees in-place.

    • set

      public void set(double x, double y)
      Sets the rotation based on X and Y components (atan2).
      Parameters:
      x - X component.
      y - Y component.

    • set

      public void set(Rotation2d other)
      Sets the rotation equal to another Rotation2d in-place.

    • interpolate

      public Rotation2d interpolate(Rotation2d endValue, double t)
      Description copied from interface: Interpolatable
      Interpolates between this value and another value.
      Specified by:
      interpolate in interface Interpolatable<Rotation2d>
      Parameters:
      endValue - The end value to interpolate towards.
      t - The percentage to interpolate [0.0, 1.0]. 0.0 returns this value, 1.0 returns the endValue.
      Returns:
      The interpolated value.
